guidelinesText:
UNDERWRITING GUIDELINES – SMALL COMMERCIAL PACKAGE

TARGET CLASSES
- Casual dining restaurants
- Coffee shops and cafes
- Small bakeries
- Boutique retail stores
- Florists
- Small professional offices

BUSINESS REQUIREMENTS
- Minimum years in business: 3
- Minimum years with current owner: 2
- Maximum annual revenue: $5,000,000
- Maximum employees: 40

PROPERTY REQUIREMENTS
- Building age must be 40 years or newer OR have updated electrical and plumbing
- Roof must be less than 20 years old
- Fire extinguishers required and serviced
- Smoke detectors required
- Sprinkler system preferred but not required
- No structural damage

OCCUPANCY
- Owner occupied preferred (50% or greater)
- Multi-tenant buildings acceptable if tenants are low hazard
- No manufacturing or heavy industrial operations allowed

RESTAURANT REQUIREMENTS
Acceptable:
- Casual dining
- Coffee shops
- Bakeries

Conditions:
- Deep fryers allowed only with automatic suppression systems
- Commercial hood suppression system required
- Liquor sales allowed only if less than 40% of revenue

DECLINE IF
- Nightclubs
- Bars where liquor is more than 50% of revenue
- Hookah lounges

PROPERTY VALUE LIMITS
- Maximum building value: $3,000,000
- Maximum contents value: $1,000,000
- Business interruption coverage allowed

LOSS HISTORY
Acceptable:
- Maximum 2 losses within the past 5 years
- No single loss greater than $100,000

DECLINE IF
- Fire loss within the past 3 years
- Pattern of slip and fall claims

INELIGIBLE RISKS
- Vacant properties
- Cannabis operations
- Firearms sales
- Hazardous chemical storage
- Nightclubs
- Adult entertainment businesses
submissionText:
SUBMISSION

Insured Name: Golden Spoon Café LLC
DBA: Golden Spoon Café
Entity Type: Limited Liability Company
Years in Business: 6
Years with Current Owner: 6
NAICS Code: 722513 – Limited-Service Restaurants

LOCATION
Risk Address: 214 Market Street
City: Portland
State: OR
ZIP: 97205

BUILDING INFORMATION
Building Type: Mixed-use building
Year Built: 1998
Construction: Masonry
Roof: Replaced in 2018

OCCUPANCY
Primary Occupancy: Coffee shop / café
Owner Occupied: 100%
Secondary Tenants: None
Hours of Operation: 6 AM – 4 PM
Number of Employees: 12

OPERATIONS
Annual Revenue: $1,200,000
Cooking Operations: Light cooking
Cooking Equipment: Espresso machines, panini press, commercial oven
Deep Fryer: No
Liquor Sales: No

PROPERTY COVERAGE REQUESTED
Building Coverage: Not requested (tenant space)
Business Personal Property: $250,000
Business Income: $150,000

LIABILITY COVERAGE
General Liability Limit: $1,000,000 per occurrence / $2,000,000 aggregate

SAFETY CONTROLS
Fire extinguishers inspected annually
Smoke detectors installed
No open flame cooking

LOSS HISTORY (5 YEARS)
No losses reported

guidelinesText:
Sample Property Underwriting Guidelines
Pelorus Demo Carrier – Property Program
The following underwriting guidelines outline the eligibility criteria for commercial property submissions.
These rules are used to triage incoming submissions and determine whether a risk is acceptable, refer,
or decline.
1. Roof age must be less than 20 years.
2. Total insured value must not exceed $1,000,000.
3. Property must be owner-occupied.
4. Maximum two claims in the past five years.
5. Buildings constructed before 1900 are ineligible.
6. Vacant properties for more than 60 days are ineligible.
7. Sprinkler systems required for buildings larger than 25,000 square feet.
8. Properties located in FEMA Flood Zone A or V require underwriting referral.
9. Restaurants with deep fryer operations require automatic fire suppression systems.
10. Properties within 1 mile of the coastline require underwriting referral.
Example Fact Acceptable Range
Roof Age (Years) < 20
Total Insured Value ≤ $1,000,000
Claims (Last 5 Years) ≤ 2
Owner Occupancy Required

-- 1 of 1 --
